plugin.name: Aardwolf_GQuest_Miniwindow
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Shows a miniwindow with Global Quest level-range text + clickable Join text

trigger.match: ^Global Quest: Global quest # \d+ has been declared for levels

muclient.script:
require "themed_miniwindows"
my_window = nil local current_quest_num = nil
function process_gquest(trigger_name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Extract the quest number after the # current_quest_num = string.match(line, "#%s*(%d+)") or ""
if not my_window or not my_window.id then my_window = ThemedTextWindow( GetPluginID() .. "_gquest", 200, 200, 650, 340, "Global Quest Alert", "center", true, -- temporary (adds X close button) true, -- resizeable false, -- text_scrollable false, -- text_selectable false, -- text_copyable false, -- url_hyperlinks true, -- autowrap nil, nil, GetAlphaOption("output_font_name"), GetOption("output_font_height"), 50, 8, false, false ) else my_window:clear(false) end
-- Add the original colored Global Quest announcement line my_window:add_text(styles, false)
-- Add a blank line my_window:add_text("@W", false)
-- Add the clickable "Join Global Quest" text if current_quest_num and current_quest_num ~= "" then local join_cmd = "gquest join " .. current_quest_num
my_window:add_text( "@WClick here to join: ", false )
-- Add clickable hyperlink-style text (using the same mechanism as other themed windows / market plugin style) my_window:add_text( "@GJoin Global Quest #" .. current_quest_num, false, { { start = 1, stop = #("Join Global Quest #" .. current_quest_num), text = 'Execute("' .. join_cmd .. '")', label = "Join Global Quest #" .. current_quest_num } } ) else -- Fallback if number couldn't be parsed my_window:add_text( "@WClick here to join the Global Quest", false, { { start = 1, stop = #"Click here to join the Global Quest", text = 'Execute("gquest join")', label = "Join Global Quest" } } ) end
my_window:draw() my_window:show() my_window:bring_to_front()
-- Repaint calls (kept from your original for compatibility with themed_miniwindows / other plugins) CallPlugin("abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") CallPlugin("abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint")
DoAfterSpecial(0, [[ CallPlugin("abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") CallPlugin("abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") ]], 12)
ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Global Quest captured to miniwindow with clickable join link!") end
function OnPluginDisable() if my_window and my_window.id then my_window:delete() my_window = nil end end
